case_label: Case 3 - Brake Requested but Brake Lamp Never Lights (Issue)
description: Vehicle at 65 km/h with a critical 6 m following distance. riskScore reaches 100, exceeding both WARNING_RISK(60) and BRAKE_RISK(85). FEATURE_ENABLE=1 (feature is ON, unlike Case 2). EvaluateBrake() correctly sets brakeRequest=1 and the actuator log confirms the brake was physically applied. However, the HMI never shows any brake indicator: UpdateBrakeLamp() in display.c receives brakeRequest but its body is a no-op ('(void)brakeRequest;'), and the HMIData struct in common.h has no brakeLamp field at all. Investigation target: why does the dashboard show no brake indicator despite a correct backend brake decision and a confirmed physical brake application.

hmiData.brakeLamp_note: No brakeLamp field exists in HMIData (common.h). UpdateBrakeLamp(brakeRequest) in display.c does not write any HMI state.
